findings.issue: Zip-file handoff lacks cryptographic authentication, enabling forged payloads via compromised Downloads folder
findings.recommended_fix: Implement signed content-hash verification with asymmetric signing instances

findings.issue: Missing audit-trail layer violates Crystal Law 5 (no-leaderboards) by enabling untraceable data manipulation
findings.recommended_fix: Log all handoffs to zeus.governance_events with content-hash + courier-timestamp + signing-instance metadata

findings.issue: Single-person relay creates identity-fragmentation risk if compromised (malware/social-engineering/kidnapping)
findings.recommended_fix: Deploy multi-party threshold signing for critical operations
